series_metadata.series_title: Recordings of Hearings before Hearing Officers
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of recordings, including but not limited to, cassette tapes, CD''s or audio recordings, of a hearing before a hearing officer.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Recordings are retained five years from date disciplinary case file is closed - date of Division''s final notice, Board or Commission''s Order, or expiration of appeals, whichever is longer. recordings, if in cassette tape or CD may be recycled and if in machine readable format, may be deleted
